error_signature: empty field for relationship in ClickUp task
title: Empty relationship field in ClickUp task creation
symptom: When creating or updating a task in ClickUp, the relationship field remains empty despite attempts to set it.
applies_when: Creating or updating tasks with relationship fields
not_this_if: The relationship field is correctly populated in other tasks
root_cause: The ClickUp API requires that relationship fields be populated as a list of IDs. Simply setting the value is insufficient; the API expects a specific JSON structure that includes the 'add' keyword to indicate the IDs to be added to the relationship list.
fix_steps: Use the HTTP request node or the ClickUp create/update task node.
In the JSON body, structure the relationship field as follows: { 'value': { 'add': [ '{{ $(‘Get Contract’).item.json.id }}' ] } }
Ensure that the ID being referenced is correctly retrieved from the previous node.
agent_instruction: Structure the relationship field in the JSON body to include the 'add' keyword with the appropriate IDs.
